content: Phase 3 — Market Matching Engine. Task: build arb-matcher crate (normalize, scorer, types, pipeline, store) + CLI --match wiring + config/pairs.toml. Fully specified build prompt with exact code. Single-domain (projects/arbitrage-trader/crates/**). Using single-worker shortcut: Orchestrator → Backend Dev directly.
Delegated to Backend Dev directly (single-worker shortcut). Task: implement all 3 sub-prompts (3-A core engine, 3-B pipeline+store, 3-C CLI wiring) sequentially.

Phase 3 complete. Created 5 source files in arb-matcher (types, normalize, scorer, pipeline, store), config/pairs.toml, updated workspace Cargo.toml (added toml dep), arb-matcher Cargo.toml, arb-cli Cargo.toml, arb-cli main.rs. 21 tests passing in arb-matcher, 118 total workspace tests. Clippy clean. 4 minor deviations: moved --match before DB init, adapted store.rs to actual MarketPairRow schema, doc comment style for clippy, kept chrono::Duration for consistency.
